content.en:
"One hundred places, a lot of places, the first place is definitely not much competition, but when the number of places is getting fewer and fewer, the competition will definitely get bigger and bigger!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he decided to take the first spot directly.

So, Ye Tian participated in the auction.

In a short time, he won the spot at the price of 3,800 Jidao coins.

After that, he didn't compete.

As the number of places became smaller and smaller, the competition became bigger and bigger, and the last spot was auctioned for a high price of 18,000 Jidao coins.

At this time, many Extreme Dao creatures were very annoyed, knowing that they should bid for the first place to win the place, and there would be no need for such fierce competition in the future.

Subsequently, a number of auction items were auctioned, among which were super perfect treasures.

At the end of the world, it is almost impossible to buy super-perfect treasures, and they are also the heritage of the top powers, and it is impossible to trade them.

Therefore, even if the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller wants to trade the Super Perfect Treasure, I am afraid that he will have to pay a great price.

However, there are a lot of super-perfect treasures in the Extreme Deep Sea, and they are available at this auction, and the prices are very cheap.

In the end, Ye Tian purchased a super-grade perfect treasure at a price close to 10,000 Extreme Dao Coins.

For him, this is tantamount to giving it away for nothing!

The super-grade perfect treasure he obtained at auction was also a top-notch super-perfect treasure, called the Purple Void Pearl, which could envelop an incomparably vast area, forming a shield to hide this area.

Moreover, it can also be used in battle.

The Purple Void Bead contains three kinds of Extreme Paths: Spatial Pole, Defensive Pole, and Hidden Pole.

Soon after, the last lot of the auction was taken out.

【Heavy Pupil Stone】

This belongs to the Extreme Dao Treasure, and it is a very top Extreme Dao Treasure, containing the power of the Extreme Dao of the Pupil, for the Extreme Dao creatures who cultivate the Pupil Technique, the value of this Extreme Dao treasure is no less than a Extreme Dao Treasure.

And the auction price of this Extreme Dao Treasure is very exaggerated, directly 500,000 Extreme Dao coins.

Several Extreme Creatures, the perfect controllers of the real realm, bid frantically, directly making the transaction price exceed one million.

In the end, the Lord of the Stone Pupil purchased the Heavy Pupil Stone for one million Extreme Dao Coins.

At this point, the auction is over, after all, it is only a small auction, and naturally it will not be long.

After the auction ended, Ye Tian got a token and a purple void bead, and the token was the quota certificate.

When the time comes, you only need to take this token and you can go to the graveyard of the Extreme Demon Ape.

Next, Ye Tian bought a few more treasures in the Xuandao trading area, and also bought some very ordinary perfect treasures, which could be given to the human race when the time came.

"I didn't expect that the more than 60,000 Extreme Dao coins condensed in such a short period of time could buy so many good things, if they were sold at the end of the realm, it would be enough to make my net worth skyrocket many times!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

I have to say that there are really too many resources in the Extreme Deep Sea, and it is no wonder that the Extreme Deep Sea looks down on the end of the world.

On this day, the Xuandao trading area was closed, and all the Extreme Dao creatures left.

Ye Tian naturally came out and returned to his temporary residence in the Extreme Deep Sea.

"The Extreme Dao Demon Ape Cemetery was discovered, and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Hall has not yet decided when it will be opened, it is estimated that the Extreme Dao Demon Ape was also a big man in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace at the beginning, even if he died in battle, but the cemetery is not something that other Extreme Dao creatures can enter casually. But now that the quota is on sale, it will definitely open, so let's wait slowly!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Anyway, he wasn't in a hurry about it.

Right now, what he longed for the most was to fuse the stone he had purchased from the Xuandao Trading Area, and as long as he absorbed it, he could make his copying talent promoted.

But.

His current Void Sparrow Copy Body only has the mark of Copy Talent, and does not have the real Copy Talent, so he needs to send this stone and some other resources to his copy body.

"My other replica bodies are all at the end of the realm, and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea currently has the Void Soul Sparrow Replicating Body, and the Void Soul Replicating Body has no way to condense the Replica Body, so I have to re-enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian went to the entrance of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and when he came here, he came across the body of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord.

The doppelganger of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord and the Lord of the Blood Spirit entered the Extreme Deep Sea, and they have not yet come out, but his body is guarding the entrance to the crack of the Extreme Deep Sea, waiting here.

When Ye Tian came here, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord naturally saw it and directly stopped Ye Tian.

"Lord of Endless, you want to enter here?"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord said.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"This is my dojo, you are not allowed to pass through!" the Stone Dragon Demon Lord said coldly.

"Stone Dragon Demon Lord, do you want to find death?" Ye Tian threatened.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord was even more annoyed at this moment and said, "Lord of Endless, I kindly told you about this place, and later wanted to cooperate with you, but you actually refused. If you want to keep the benefits of this place to yourself, then don't blame me for being rude. With me here, you don't want to enter here just yet!"

Ye Tian didn't bother to talk nonsense with the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, and directly cast the Extreme Dao Prison.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord tried to contend with the Extreme Dao Prison, but when the Extreme Dao Prison restrained him, he was directly stunned, and his attack couldn't shake the Extreme Dao Prison.

Airplanes!

The Extreme Dao Prison directly trapped the body of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord here, making him unable to move.

It's a seal!

"Stone Dragon Demon Lord, I'm too lazy to kill you, you are like an ant to me, this Extreme Dao Prison will not exist for long, I hope you will be honest in the future!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian casually tore through all the magic circles arranged by the Stone Dragon Demon Lord and entered the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

At this moment, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord finally knew that Ye Tian was terrible, and he didn't have the slightest power to resist.

"No wonder he became a tower master of the Wudao Tower, not because of potential, but because of strength!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord smiled bitterly.

If it weren't for his infinite resurrection, Ye Tian was afraid that he would really kill him.

Ye Tian entered the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, ignored the Extreme Dao creatures here, and directly passed through the Forbidden Black Sea, waiting for the arrival of the Void Sparrow Replicating Body near the Forbidden Black Sea.

Time passed slowly, and not long after, the Void Sparrow Replica Body arrived and delivered the thing to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian didn't stay long, and returned directly to the end of the realm.

After all, the human copy body is not suitable for staying in the extreme deep sea, in case it is discovered, the fall of the copy body is a small matter, but if the treasure is lost, then it is a big matter!

Soon, Ye Tian came out of the entrance, glanced at the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, didn't say anything, and left directly.

Soon after, Ye Tian returned to the Daoless Tower.

"Then start refining this stone, I hope it can really raise my copying talent to a level comparable to that of the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu!"

Ye Tian said.
